package.name: Prysm
package.shortDescription: A feature-rich control center for iOS.

descriptionlist.description: Prysm includes several modules that can be removed and reordered from the settings page.

Available modules include: Connectivity toggles. Brightness and Audio sliders. Quick access toggles. Media widget. Weather conditions. Power controls (reboot, shutdown, respring, safemode and lock). Bluetooth Devices

changelog.change: Fixed Apple TV remote toggle not appearing
